studyName: SARC031: A Phase 2 Trial of Selumetinib and Sirolimus for Patients with Unresectable or Metastatic Malignant Peripheral Nerve Sheath Tumors (MPNST)

variables.name: AFFECTION_STATUS
variables.description: Case control status of the subject for MPNST

variables.name: AGE
variables.description: Subject age at enrollment

variables.name: MPNST_Subtype
variables.description: Primary tumor in soft tissue, bone, or both

variables.name: Met_sites
variables.description: Sites of metastases at time of study enrollment.

variables.name: Metastases_at_dx
variables.description: Presense of metastases at initial diagnosis

variables.name: Metastases_at_enrollment
variables.description: Presense of metastases at time of study enrollment

variables.name: NF1_STATUS
variables.description: Is the tumor sporadic or associated with NF1

variables.name: Post-operative_Recurrance
variables.description: Recurrence status post-resection of priamry tumor

variables.name: Primary_Tumor_Location
variables.description: Anatomic location of primary tumor

variables.name: Primary_Tumor_Resected
variables.description: If primary tumor had been resected pre-study enrollment

variables.name: Resection_Outcome
variables.description: Residual disease status post-resection of primary tumor

variables.name: SUBJECT_ID
variables.description: Subject ID

variables.name: ANALYTE_TYPE
variables.description: Analyte type

variables.name: BODY_SITE
variables.description: Body site from which sample was collected

variables.name: HISTOLOGICAL_TYPE
variables.description: Histological diagnosis

variables.name: IS_TUMOR
variables.description: Tumor status

variables.name: LOCALIZED_METASTATIC
variables.description: Localized or metastic disease.

variables.name: NEW_LESIONS
variables.description: New lesions in interval since last imaging

variables.name: SAMPLE_ID
variables.description: Sample ID

variables.name: SLD
variables.description: Sum of longest diameters (SLD) per RECIST criteria

variables.name: SUL
variables.description: SUV normalized by lean body mass (SUL)

variables.name: TREATMENT_CYCLE
variables.description: Cycle of treatment

variables.name: TUMOR_TREATMENT
variables.description: Type of tumor treatment for sample

variables.name: CONSENT
variables.description: Registered consent groups (Data Use Limitations (DUL)) as determined by submitters' Institutional Review Boards (IRB) or equivalent body.

variables.name: SEX
variables.description: Biological sex

variables.name: SUBJECT_ID
variables.description: Subject ID

variables.description: Sample ID
